title: sentry
description: A tower that shoots all kinds of arrows including custom arrow
body:
Ancient, traditional and practical arrow tower. A must for home travel, is the most powerful and reliable guardian around you.

Three kinds of blocks are added. They are base, body and shooter block.

The tower base is responsible for loading arrows and the turret is responsible for shoot. The placement order from bottom to top must be base, body, and shooter block.

You need to right click on the base block to put arrows into it, then it just works.
